de-h-id-60-mot.notes: Pilot: corps assignment held constant over the pilot window; positions derived from the corps sector (approximate).

positions.label: Turned south toward the lower Don
Uranus: pushed southwest of the ring
HQ rear of Winter Storm (relief spearhead not yet authored)

sources.citation: Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014

de-h-pzarmee-4.notes: Pilot coverage ends Feb 1943 (positionsTo); the army fought on (Kursk, Dnieper, 1945). Winter Storm spearhead (LVII. Panzerkorps) not yet authored — expected to appear on the unit-vs-front worklist when added.

sources.citation: Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014

su-gd-rd-39.notes: Formed from the 5th Airborne Corps. Pilot: city positions schematic (west-bank strip); the division held a narrow riverside sector inside the drawn pocket ring, so side checks report it as contested.
